metadata.task_title: Compress a JPG to a smaller size
metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 90.jpg in Documents > Task 90 folder on Photos app. Reduce the image size to 40%
metadata.context: I have a picture but is too large to share as an email attachment. I need a smaller JPEG.

tabs.title: how to reduce image size in windows photos app - Google Search
